feat.name: Embodiment Of The Balance
feat.text: Your place in the balance between the forces of life and entropy expands the spells you can pull from the spirit realms. You add *heal* and *harm* to your apparition spell repertoire, allowing you to cast them with your apparition spellcasting.

traits.name: Animist
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the animist class.
